ba&sh: Bonjour! I'm Chloé your personal concierge at ba&sh! 

Use code WELCOMEUSA15 at checkout to enjoy 15% off your first full price order https://bash.attn.tv/aYuR4dWxLgRd . Plus, enjoy free shipping! 

You can also reach me here anytime with any questions while you shop!
ba&sh: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!

ba&sh: Don't forget to shop with your welcome code WELCOMEUSA15 and save 15% off your first full-price purchase. Enjoy free shipping and returns. Shop now! https://bash.attn.tv/andqMPxnX-xj .

Please let me know if there's anything I can help with!
ba&sh: Hi, it's Chloé from ba&sh. How can I help you today? https://bash.attn.tv/apDP3UFvnDUS
my order was canceled and I'm waiting for a refund for two weeks now. How much longer do I have to wait?
ba&sh: I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Let me check on this with the team for you. May I have your order number and email address so I can forward this to the team?
margokrol1973@gmail.com  order 08673105 belt
ba&sh: I passed this along to my team! As soon as I get a response, I'll get back to you! Thank you for your patience!
At the suggestion of the employee I ordered this belt again so the status is that it is supposed to arrive. I hope I will receive it soon, so I am asking for a refund for the previous order thanks
ba&sh: Thank you for your purchase and I'm sorry for the delay. I'm still waiting for my team on the update rest assured when I hear from them I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

conversation.message_text: True Religion: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/b82
True Religion: We're True Family Now! Take 15% off your first purchase with code WELCOME15. Check out our signature denim and more -> https://myrlgn.attn.tv/aJECD9UcnBf2 .

True Religion: Oh, also, a lot of people like getting personal recs from us. Over the next few days we'll try to help you find something great.

ICYMI: New arrivals just dropped including everything from graphic tees to puffer jackets, denim jeans, shorts, and MORE! Grab your faves before they sell out -> https://myrlgn.attn.tv/adrh2PSwU2R8 .
True Religion: VIPS ONLY! Take an EXTRA 20% off $150+ w/code LABOR. Everything's already 50% OFF, so don't wait -> https://myrlgn.attn.tv/a_2CzqmC0bQB

True Religion: Hey there! Hope you're doing well.

Don't miss the chance to check out our exclusive items: https://myrlgn.attn.tv/a3tmVjoLh0vV .

True Religion: OMG! The Gold Buckle Belt is a must-have. Hurry before it's too late!

Shop now: https://myrlgn.attn.tv/a9U15sNqe5mE .
How do I track my order

True Religion: Happy to help! You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://myrlgn.attn.tv/aSxxuQuD5DJW For more information on your order, you can live chat with one of our agents from 9am-4pm Monday-Friday via SMS +1-855-928-6124 or the widget on our site. 

You can also email us directly at cs@truereligion.com. It usually takes 24hrs during the week and 24-48hrs during the weekend to get a response from the team.
True Religion: Give your pants a break. 50% OFF SHORTS* + EXTRA 20% OFF $150+ w/code LABOR. Hurry, this SHORT cut won't last https://myrlgn.attn.tv/aXdH4ujb89a3
When is my package arriving

True Religion: I understand you're eager to know when your package will arrive. I don't have access to that information directly, but you can easily check the latest updates on your order using our online tracking tool here: https://myrlgn.attn.tv/as4k1AZrv8hu Just key in your order number and email address then click Check Status. Your order number is sent to your email address. Please also check your spam or promo folders as sometimes emails end up there.

You can also chat with one of our agents via SMS at +1-855-928-6124 from 9am-4pm Monday-Friday, or use the chat widget on our site. Alternatively, you can email us at cs@truereligion.com, and we typically respond within 24 hours during the week and 24-48 hours on weekends.

Thank you for your patience, and I can't wait for your item to arrive! Let me know what you think of it!

Don't miss out: https://coldwatercreek.attn.tv/sl/nIhqssmH .
Why does it say it will ship 9/02?

Coldwater Creek: I'm sorry for any confusion. The shipping date you see is the estimated date when the item will leave our warehouse. If you need more details about your order, please visit our order status page: https://coldwatercreek.attn.tv/sl/KVYooKFk.
I don't want it in September!  I want a new blouse in May!

Coldwater Creek: I understand your concern. If you need a blouse sooner, I recommend checking other styles on our website. If you've already placed an order and wish to modify it, please contact our customer service directly at https://coldwatercreek.attn.tv/sl/1IlShM84. They'll be able to assist you further.
I haven't ordered!  I'm wondering why you'd offer such a summery looking blouse in September.

Coldwater Creek: I understand your concern. The Rio Vista Tunic is a versatile piece that can be worn in any season. However, the availability of our products can vary due to demand and production schedules. We always strive to provide a variety of styles throughout the year. Please check our website regularly for new arrivals and restocks.
